use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons requiring visual emphasis with soft luminous effects
Icon buttons for toolbars or navigation menus with glowing feedback on hover
Action buttons in SaaS dashboards where visual hierarchy matters
ai_summary: A soft glow button component featuring gradient backgrounds, shadow-based glow effects, and ring styling. The button includes hover brightness animation and active state transitions for interactive feedback. Designed as a visually prominent input element suitable for primary actions in web applications.
